title: Spy-mod
description: This mod adds spy items from TF2.
body:
The mod adds 6 spy items from TF2:
A knife and a golden knife, the enemy dies with one blow if it is struck in the back.
When used, the camouflage set puts a mask on you, which you can remove by waving your hand.
Dead Ringer, if you are attacked you will become invisible, gain speed and resistance, you can find out the remaining invisibility time by the texture.
BUGS! Armor may disappear when you put on a mask or activate your watch.
Invisibility Watch, when used you become invisible.
